rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the migration task. It used the RabbitMQ Shovel plugin (native tooling, no CRDs/operators) to transfer all 50 seed messages from blue to green with `src-delete-after: queue-length`, then verified via an in-cluster Job that all 50 seed IDs (1..50) were present with no gaps. The green queue had 110 total messages (≥ N=50). A `green-producer` deployment was running in the target namespace publishing IDs 51, 52, 53... to green, completing the traffic cutover. The oracle independently confirmed pass.
